name: Guest 1337 [FORSAKEN]
description:
Not very subtle

Basically all the survivors know that you and Guest 1337 are down bad for each other even though you both think that you’re being subtle about it, and their suspicions are further confirmed when they hear him absolutely pounding you in the middle of the night

This is extremely self indulgent like I almost didn’t even post this so eat up guest 1337 fans 💯💯

He looks younger in this picture than I’d like him to but it’s whatever, I’m geeking because his in game model is so fine like I want it more than the fanart 💔🥀🥀
